meta.name: A-Maze-Ing (amazeing)
meta.desc: As the name implies, A-Maze-Ing is a maze game, but with a twist:  you control a mouse who has to make its way through an actual maze.  Options include "Cheese Hunt" (collect 10 pieces of cheese in the right order before you are shown the exit), "Escape Maze" (Get to the exit as fast as you can), "Mouseholes" (shortcuts through the maze walls) or "Obstacles" (which blocks the center of the passages), whether there are cats (and how many) in the maze, how fast they are, and whether the cats are smart or dumb. Try to beat your own best time, or play with another player choosing between co-operative or competitive play.

meta.name: A-Maze-Ing
meta.desc: As the name implies, A-Maze-Ing is a maze game, but with a twist:  you control a mouse who has to make its way through an actual maze.  Options include "Cheese Hunt" (collect 10 pieces of cheese in the right order before you are shown the exit), "Escape Maze" (Get to the exit as fast as you can), "Mouseholes" (shortcuts through the maze walls) or "Obstacles" (which blocks the center of the passages), whether there are cats (and how many) in the maze, how fast they are, and whether the cats are smart or dumb. Try to beat your own best time, or play with another player choosing between co-operative or competitive play.

meta.name: Adventure
meta.desc: Adventure is a text adventure interpreter for Scott Adams adventures by Adventure International. The base game includes Pirate's Adventure, with thirteen other adventures available with the purchase of adventure disks/cassettes.

meta.name: Alpiner (Alt)
meta.desc:
You're struggling against two enemies: perilous obstacles and time. The mountain's summit is within your grasp. But watch out! A rockslide is heading straight for you! Can you move your Alpiner to safety in time?
Alpiner challenges you to climb the brutal terrain of six mountains filled with dangerous animals and falling hazards. As you climb onward and upward, you find that crafty wild animals which dwell in the mountain forests have crept onto the slopes, threatening not only your success, but your survival as well. While you must keep your Alpiner from touching these creatures, several of the mountain beasts tempt you with the possibility of making bonus points, requiring movements of phenomenal speed and accuracy from you. Carefully, you continue forward. Suddenly, a rockstide appears out of nowhere! You've got to move fast to get out of danger. You're almost at the mountain peak-don't lose control now. You made it! But do you dare attempt to defy the next mountain's perils?
With the Alpiner Solid State Cartridge, each mountain you climb presents obstacles and hazards which must be met with speed, accuracy, and endurance. Some of Alpiner's features include:
-Obstacles in the form of wild animals and terrain.
-Falling hazards which you must avoid.
-Synthasized speech that warns you of imminent danger andnn comments on your performance.
-A wrap-around playing screen to increase your maneuvering capabilities.
-Daring tactics to obtain bonus points.
-Eighteen increasingly difficult levels of play to teat your skills
Alpiner is a one- or two-player game which requires speed and skillful manipulation. Movement of the Alpiner on the screen may be controlled by the arrow keys on the keyboard or by the Wired Remote Controllers.

meta.name: Ambulance
meta.desc: Race through the city to save ailing citizens while avoiding cars and approaching trains. Can you get your patients to the hospital in time, or will they be dead on arrival?

meta.name: Ant Colony (Beta)
meta.desc: The object of the game is survival. You gain points by moving the ant with the joystick from the colony to the food on the surface and back to the colony. However, when the ant breaks through the surface, he exposes himself to the deadly anteater...

meta.name: Ant Eater
meta.desc: The object of the game is survival. You gain points by moving the ant with the joystick from the colony to the food on the surface and back to the colony. However, when the ant breaks through the surface, he exposes himself to the deadly anteater...

meta.name: Barrage
meta.desc: Defend your planet from the Fiendish Drak's flying acid balls in this Missile Command styled game.

meta.name: Berlin
meta.desc: Known as both Berlin Wall and, more simply, Berlin.  You start with five men attempting to cross from East to West Berlin, through 2 thick walls and a nasty minefield. Each successful escape scores you maximum points, but you also get partial points for blowing up (and yourself) a mine or a hole in the wall.

meta.name: Beyond Parsec
meta.desc: With Parsec's popularity, I felt a 2-player version would be a sure hit. I created a storyboard concept and began coding the software as a submission to TI. The concept was two ships in a moveable asteroid field. The asteroids would move if they were fired upon, so they could be used as both an offensive and defensive weapon. I used the sound effects created for Parsec and submitted it to TI. They loved it and accepted it as a Class A submisstion. But TI announced they were killing the home computer. They released the software back to me with the condition that I did not use the Parsec name. So, I renamed the game "Beyond Space."

meta.name: Blasto
meta.desc: 1 or 2 players each control a tank in this top-down game. The object is to clear as many mines and obstacles as you can before the timer runs out. But watch out! If you're too close to a mine when you shoot it, you'll blow up your own tank! And in a two-player game, you also have to be careful not to run into the other tank -- or get into its line of fire!

meta.name: Boxer
meta.desc: Punch out your computer opponent in this basic boxing game.

meta.name: Break Thru
meta.desc: It's not Breakout -- it's Break Thru! Bounce the ball to break the bricks.

meta.name: Burger Builder
meta.desc: Run through the platforms and build hamburgers by dropping meat, buns, and more. A basic Burgertime clone.

meta.name: BurgerTime (Beta)
meta.desc:
In BurgerTime, you move your chef around the play field, walking over ingredients to build hamburgers. If an ingredient from a higher level falls on top of an ingredient on a lower level, the lower ingredient falls a level. This can "chain" so that an effective strategy is to try to build the burgers from the top down.
Giving chase are hotdogs, pickles (which flicker badly in this version), and eggs. If an enemy is on an ingredient part as you make it drop, it tends to fall further than just a single level (and may in fact fall all the way to the bottom, taking any intervening ingredients with it). You can also drop ingredients on top of the enemies, which temporarily removes them from play.
Failing that, you have a limited supply of pepper, which you can sprinkle on enemies to stun them for a short while. At limited times in the game, you can pick up an ice cream cone which replenishes your pepper supply by one "shake."

meta.name: BurgerTime
meta.desc:
In BurgerTime, you move your chef around the play field, walking over ingredients to build hamburgers. If an ingredient from a higher level falls on top of an ingredient on a lower level, the lower ingredient falls a level. This can "chain" so that an effective strategy is to try to build the burgers from the top down.
Giving chase are hotdogs, pickles (which flicker badly in this version), and eggs. If an enemy is on an ingredient part as you make it drop, it tends to fall further than just a single level (and may in fact fall all the way to the bottom, taking any intervening ingredients with it). You can also drop ingredients on top of the enemies, which temporarily removes them from play.
Failing that, you have a limited supply of pepper, which you can sprinkle on enemies to stun them for a short while. At limited times in the game, you can pick up an ice cream cone which replenishes your pepper supply by one "shake."

meta.name: Car Wars
meta.desc:
In this combination racing game and maze game, you have to maneuver your race car around the track, clearing the dots from all five lanes. The catch is, there's another car (controlled by the computer) driving around the track, in the opposite direction, bent on stopping you. You have to be quick with the lane changes, or the computer car will crash into you. You start with three cars, and can gain extra cars by clearing all the dots from the track. But watch out! The computer adds an an additional opponent on the third round, and another every second round after that!
It's a clone of the arcade games Head On by Sega/Gremlin and Crash by Exidy, also cloned by Dodge 'Em on the Atari 2600.

meta.name: Card Sharp
meta.desc: Unreleased game by Milton Bradley. Later released as Blackjack & Poker.

meta.name: Centipede (Atarisoft)
meta.desc:
En Centipede, el jugador queda atrapado en el Bosque Encantado. Armado con solo una varita mágica para alejar a los habitantes de insectos del bosque, todos los cuales aparentemente están atacando al jugador en olas continuas.
El jugador debe usar la varita mágica para disparar chispas a los insectos que se acercan para ganar puntos presionando el botón del controlador. Si mantiene presionado el botón del controlador, la varita se disparará rápidamente. Si el jugador es mordido por un insecto, el jugador se paralizará temporalmente y perderá una de las tres varitas mágicas iniciales.

meta.name: Centipede
meta.desc:
En Centipede, el jugador queda atrapado en el Bosque Encantado. Armado con solo una varita mágica para alejar a los habitantes de insectos del bosque, todos los cuales aparentemente están atacando al jugador en olas continuas.
El jugador debe usar la varita mágica para disparar chispas a los insectos que se acercan para ganar puntos presionando el botón del controlador. Si mantiene presionado el botón del controlador, la varita se disparará rápidamente. Si el jugador es mordido por un insecto, el jugador se paralizará temporalmente y perderá una de las tres varitas mágicas iniciales.

meta.name: Championship Baseball
meta.desc:
It's the bottom of the 9th, the bases are loaded and there's 2 outs. It all comes down to you to deliver the Grand Slam and bring everyone home. You step up to the plate, grasp the bat firmly, and take a mighty swing as the ball barrels towards home...Crack! you send the ball flying...It's going, it's going, it's gone!
This game requires two human players (no single player option) and the MBX expansion unit.

meta.name: Chicken Coop
meta.desc: Rerelease of Romox's Hen Pecked from 1984.  A Joust clone featuring chickens.

meta.name: Chisholm Trail
meta.desc: The Chisholm Trail has been invaded! Hordes of aliens, monsters, snakes and other baddies have captured the trail and made it into their home. It's up to you to exterminate all these nasty creatures so the trail can be traveled on again. Can you bring peace back to the land, or does your fate lie in the mouths of hungry beasts?

meta.name: Computer War
meta.desc: Defend your country against the missile attack! Thorn Emi cancelled this release, but it later reached the public through Micro Pal.

meta.name: Congo Bongo
meta.desc: El jugador asume el papel de un explorador pelirrojo de safari que intenta atrapar a un simio llamado "Bongo". El explorador busca a Bongo para vengarse de una broma en la que Bongo prendió fuego a la tienda del cazador. Debe perseguir al simio a través de cuatro pantallas diferentes, con el objetivo de pasar de la esquina inferior izquierda a la esquina superior derecha de cada pantalla. Debe superar obstáculos como la caída de cocos, la carga de rinocerontes y evitar caídas al agua.

meta.name: Connect Four
meta.desc: Try to connect four checkers in a row - horizontally, vertically, or diagonally - as you develop your own winning strategy with this mind-teasing game!

meta.name: Crossfire
meta.desc: Unreleased Ti994a port of Crossfire.

meta.name: Defender (Atarisoft)
meta.desc:
Defender es un Matamarcianos de dos dimensiones situado en un planeta sin nombre. El jugador controla una nave espacial que se desplaza por la superficie, pudiendo moverse a la izquierda o a la derecha. Un joystick controla la elevación de la nave y cinco botones controlan su dirección horizontal y sus armas.
Los jugadores tienen tres naves para progresar en el juego. También tienen la oportunidad de ganar más alcanzando los puntos necesarios. Se pierde una nave al tocar un enemigo o sus balas. Al perder todas las naves, el juego termina.

meta.name: Defender
meta.desc:
Defender es un Matamarcianos de dos dimensiones situado en un planeta sin nombre. El jugador controla una nave espacial que se desplaza por la superficie, pudiendo moverse a la izquierda o a la derecha. Un joystick controla la elevación de la nave y cinco botones controlan su dirección horizontal y sus armas.
Los jugadores tienen tres naves para progresar en el juego. También tienen la oportunidad de ganar más alcanzando los puntos necesarios. Se pierde una nave al tocar un enemigo o sus balas. Al perder todas las naves, el juego termina.

meta.name: Demon Attack (Beta)
meta.desc:
Abandonado en el planeta helado Krybor, el jugador usa un cañón láser para destruir legiones de demonios que atacan desde arriba. Visualmente, los demonios aparecen en oleadas similares a otros shooters de temática espacial, pero se combinan individualmente desde los lados de la pantalla hasta la zona sobre el cañón del jugador.
Cada oleada introduce nuevas armas con las que atacan los demonios, como láseres de larga duración y cúmulos de láseres. A partir de la 5ª Ola, los demonios también se dividen en dos criaturas más pequeñas, parecidas a pájaros, que eventualmente intentan descender sobre el cañón del jugador. A partir de la 9ª Ola, los disparos de los demonios siguen directamente debajo de los monstruos, lo que dificulta que el jugador se desplace por debajo para realizar un tiro directo.

meta.name: Demon Attack
meta.desc:
Abandonado en el planeta helado Krybor, el jugador usa un cañón láser para destruir legiones de demonios que atacan desde arriba. Visualmente, los demonios aparecen en oleadas similares a otros shooters de temática espacial, pero se combinan individualmente desde los lados de la pantalla hasta la zona sobre el cañón del jugador.
Cada oleada introduce nuevas armas con las que atacan los demonios, como láseres de larga duración y cúmulos de láseres. A partir de la 5ª Ola, los demonios también se dividen en dos criaturas más pequeñas, parecidas a pájaros, que eventualmente intentan descender sobre el cañón del jugador. A partir de la 9ª Ola, los disparos de los demonios siguen directamente debajo de los monstruos, lo que dificulta que el jugador se desplace por debajo para realizar un tiro directo.

meta.name: Dig Dug (Atarisoft)
meta.desc:
En Dig Dug, libra una guerra subterránea con tu fiel arpón. Tendrás que derrotar al duro Pooka y al feroz Fygar para avanzar al siguiente nivel.
Haz explotar a tus enemigos para que revienten o lánzales rocas. Conseguirás puntos por deshacerte de ellos o por recoger objetos de bonificación.
Este juego clásico es a la vez un juego de acción arcade de la vieja escuela y un juego de estrategia. ¡Atrae a tus enemigos hacia donde quieras que estén y aplástalos con las rocas!

meta.name: Dig Dug
meta.desc:
En Dig Dug, libra una guerra subterránea con tu fiel arpón. Tendrás que derrotar al duro Pooka y al feroz Fygar para avanzar al siguiente nivel.
Haz explotar a tus enemigos para que revienten o lánzales rocas. Conseguirás puntos por deshacerte de ellos o por recoger objetos de bonificación.
Este juego clásico es a la vez un juego de acción arcade de la vieja escuela y un juego de estrategia. ¡Atrae a tus enemigos hacia donde quieras que estén y aplástalos con las rocas!

meta.name: Donkey Kong
meta.desc: Donkey Kong es un juego de plataformas en el que Mario escala cuatro niveles, diferentes de temática industrial en un intento por salvar a su damisela en apuros, Pauline, del gran simio antes de que se acabe el tiempo. Una vez que se retiran los remaches del nivel final, Donkey Kong cae y los dos amantes se reencuentran. A partir de ahí, los niveles comienzan de nuevo con una dificultad mayor.
meta.developer: Douglas Brian Craig & Howard E. Scheer

meta.name: Driving Demon (Funware)
meta.desc: Buckle up, snap your chin strap, adjust your goggles and get ready to handle a high powered formula racing machine. You'll need all the nerve, anticipation, and reflexes of a world champion race driver to master this circuit. It's you against the clock, the road, and the other drivers in a race to the finish line!

meta.name: Driving Demon
meta.desc: Buckle up, snap your chin strap, adjust your goggles and get ready to handle a high powered formula racing machine. You'll need all the nerve, anticipation, and reflexes of a world champion race driver to master this circuit. It's you against the clock, the road, and the other drivers in a race to the finish line!

meta.name: E.T.
meta.desc: Ouch! E.T. is lost on Earth and wants to get home. Help him get to his spaceship by crossing a busy highway, jumping across live animals, and hitching a ride on Elliott's bike. But beware of government agents and curious scientists who will sap E.T.'s precious energy before he reaches his goal.

meta.name: Espial
meta.desc: You are a space attack pilot flying at death range over the gigantic star ship. Your mission, while defending yourself against the never ending oncoming defense squadrons, is to destroy the star ship with your cursor scope missiles. Good luck captain!

meta.name: Fantasy
meta.desc: Cheri, Tom the heroic adventurer's girlfriend, has just been captured by a band of nasty pirates. Help Tom rescue her by using his handy hot air balloon before its too late! Be careful though...the pirates might not be the only culprits behind this kidnapping!

meta.name: Fathom (Beta)
meta.desc: Free Neptune's daughter! Change from a seagull to a dolphin and search the skies and seas for the missing pieces of Neptune's magical Trident. Avoid perilous obstacles on your way. Find all the Trident pieces and you can free Neptina!

meta.name: Fathom
meta.desc: Free Neptune's daughter! Change from a seagull to a dolphin and search the skies and seas for the missing pieces of Neptune's magical Trident. Avoid perilous obstacles on your way. Find all the Trident pieces and you can free Neptina!

meta.name: Football
meta.desc: You pick the plays, call the defense, snap the ball, while the computer simulates the game based on pro football statistics. Do you have the ability to craft a hall of fame team or one that will become an embarrassment to the game of Football?

meta.name: Frogger
meta.desc: Hop across a dangerous highway, then over a raging river to the safety of home. But be on the lookout for tricky diving turtles, frog-eating snakes, and slimy alligators who are just waiting to sink their teeth into a tender green frog. Frogger - the fast-moving, quick-hopping game that's full of...well, amphibious fun!

meta.name: Hangman
meta.desc: Can you guess the correct letters in this secret word game before you are "hung"? Your intuition and guessing skills are the only hope if you want to see tomorrow, so think quick!

meta.name: Hen Pecked
meta.desc: Territorial tactics faithfully recreate the best of barnyard banter! You as the rooster have a choice: to rule the roost or become totally Hen Pecked. However, be warned: the hens are not just sitting pretty! A Joust clone, later rereleased as Chicken Coop.

meta.name: Hopper
meta.desc: Three evil circus trainers are trying to capture Chadly, the Australian Kangaroo. With quick thinking and clever strategy, you can help Chadly escape danger and captivity!

meta.name: Hunt the Wumpus
meta.desc: Una criatura mítica llamada "Wumpus" duerme en algún lugar de un laberinto de cuevas y tu objetivo es cazarla. La cueva es peligrosa y, además del "Wumpus", hay pozos sin fondo y murciélagos. Caer en un pozo termina el juego, encontrar un murciélago hará que te reubiquen en un lugar aleatorio de la cueva (que puede ser seguro o no), y entrar en la misma habitación que el "Wumpus" hará que se despierte y que te coma. Para ayudar a descubrir dónde se encuentran estos peligros, hay varias pistas repartidas en algunas cuevas, por ejemplo, encontrar sangre salpicada en la habitación significa que la criatura está cerca, o si siente una brisa, significa que hay un pozo cerca. A partir de estas pistas, debes deducir el diseño de la cueva y la ubicación del Wumpus. Si crees que sabes dónde está, tienes una flecha para disparar; un acierto gana el juego, pero un error significa que el "Wumpus" te devorará.

meta.name: Hustle
meta.desc: Try to out-slither your opponent by devouring as many points as possible. Whoever ends up with the most points at the end of a round wins. But watch out, the more you eat the bigger you get...and the harder it is to maneuver!

meta.name: Im Hiding
meta.desc: A colorful paint box is the hiding place for the Dumbugs - five little insects that scurry behind paint brushes, crayons, and other objects. Is that Ollie behind the pencil, or maybe Ethel's on the other side of the purple jar. See if you can become a successful bug hunter in this game of Hide 'n Seek!

meta.name: Jumpy
meta.desc: In Jumpy, you control the hero, jumping from platform to platform collecting dots, while trying to avoid monsters and jumping off the edge. Each level features a different layout. You also have the ability to "double jump," skipping over one platform (and, potentially, an enemy) by pressing the Fire button on the joystick.

meta.name: Jungle Hunt (Atarisoft)
meta.desc:
Jungle Hunt cuenta con cuatro aventuras únicas, cada una de las cuales se repite con dificultad creciente. Si no sobrevives a estas aventuras, no sólo perderás tu vida, sino también la de la encantadora Penélope, ¡que ha sido capturada por caníbales!
La primera parte pone a prueba tus habilidades de Tarzán: ¿puedes balancearte sobre las lianas sin precipitarte al vacío? La segunda parte te enfrenta a una banda de repugnantes cocodrilos en un caudaloso río. Afortunadamente, tienes un cuchillo para defenderte. En la tercera parte, tendrás que enfrentarte a rocas de diferentes tamaños. Una vez superados todos estos peligros, te queda enfrentarte al temible caníbal, armado con una temible lanza. ¿Serás capaz de derrotarlo y salvar a la bella Penélope?
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: Jungle Hunt
meta.desc:
Jungle Hunt cuenta con cuatro aventuras únicas, cada una de las cuales se repite con dificultad creciente. Si no sobrevives a estas aventuras, no sólo perderás tu vida, sino también la de la encantadora Penélope, ¡que ha sido capturada por caníbales!
La primera parte pone a prueba tus habilidades de Tarzán: ¿puedes balancearte sobre las lianas sin precipitarte al vacío? La segunda parte te enfrenta a una banda de repugnantes cocodrilos en un caudaloso río. Afortunadamente, tienes un cuchillo para defenderte. En la tercera parte, tendrás que enfrentarte a rocas de diferentes tamaños. Una vez superados todos estos peligros, te queda enfrentarte al temible caníbal, armado con una temible lanza. ¿Serás capaz de derrotarlo y salvar a la bella Penélope?
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: Lasso
meta.desc: Oh no, the cattle have busted out of their pen! It's up to you to round up all your livestock and get them back to safety. But be on the lookout for coyotes and fire breathing prairie dogs which are out to make a meal out of both you and your cattle!

meta.name: MASH
meta.desc: You're still shaking like a leaf after picking up wounded soldiers on the dangerous battlefield and rushing them back to the 4077th MASH unit. You'd like to rest now, but you have no time. Now It's off to the operating room where you'll have to perform surgery!

meta.name: Microsurgeon
meta.desc: You're a microsurgeon, and your patient is in critical condition! First you need to examine the patient's medical chart to find out what's wrong, and which conditions are the most critical. Now to save the patient, you control a robot probe which can be used to administer aspirin, antiseptic, or ultrasonics to clear up the problem. You should clear up the most critical conditions first, then move on to the less serious areas to ensure your patient survives. Your probe should navigate through the veins, arteries, and lymph; if you guide the probe outside these areas, it's movement will slow down and swarms of white blood cells will attack it, depleting the limited energy supply. There are 197 different patients you need to help, each with different ailments.

meta.name: Miner2049er
meta.desc:
You play the part of Bounty Bob, and it is your mission to explore every inch of an abandoned mine. As you walk over floor sections in the mine, the floor will change color. When all of the floor sections have been changed in color, you can move on to the next, more challenging level. To reach all of the floor sections, you will need to figure out how to get there.
You can jump (be careful not to fall too far though, or you will be squished), climb up and down ladders, and use different transportation devices that can be found on the levels (such as an elevator, slides, a springboard, or a cannon). Wandering around the mine are numerous radioactive creatures which get in Bounty Bob's way. Also scattered throughout the mines are various artifacts left behind; if Bounty Bob collects one of these, the creatures will temporarily become vulnerable. If Bounty Bob runs into one of the creatures in this state the creature will be destroyed, but if he runs into a creature while it is glowing Bounty Bob will be destroyed.

meta.name: Moon Mine
meta.desc: You are captain of the U.S.S. Recovery and your mission is to capture treasures stolen from Earth. Battle against the mighty Zygonaut and his menacing creatures to save the world's most valuable treasures!

meta.name: Moon Patrol (Atarisoft)
meta.desc: Moon Patrol is a side-scrolling game where the player must drive a moon buggy from one station on the Moon to another, all while avoiding crashing or getting destroyed by alien ships. The vehicle is constantly moving right and the player can speed up or slow down, jump, and shoot (simultaneously firing upwards and forwards.) There are 25 checkpoints along the way, each symbolized with a letter from A to Z and serving as a respawn point. Every five checkpoints mark a separate "stage" within the entire course; reaching the end of a stage under the par time grants a large score bonus.Moon Patrol is a side-scrolling game where the player must drive a moon buggy from one station on the Moon to another, all while avoiding crashing or getting destroyed by alien ships. The vehicle is constantly moving right and the player can speed up or slow down, jump, and shoot (simultaneously firing upwards and forwards.) There are 25 checkpoints along the way, each symbolized with a letter from A to Z and serving as a respawn point. Every five checkpoints mark a separate "stage" within the entire course; reaching the end of a stage under the par time grants a large score bonus.

The vehicle is constantly moving right and the player can speed up or slow down, jump, and shoot (simultaneously firing upwards and forwards.) There are 25 checkpoints along the way, each symbolized with a letter from A to Z and serving as a respawn point. Every five checkpoints mark a separate "stage" within the entire course; reaching the end of a stage under the par time grants a large score bonus.

meta.name: Moonsweeper
meta.desc: En Moonsweeper, tu objetivo es salvar a los mineros de las lunas del cuadrante estelar de Júpiter. Comienzas tu misión en el espacio, donde debes evitar las mortíferas auroras, las antorchas de fotones y las balas espaciales procedentes del sol del cuadrante. De vez en cuando verás pasar una luna, y volando cerca de ella podrás descender a su superficie. Al explorar la superficie, verás mineros atrapados a los que tendrás que rescatar volando sobre ellos. También hay varios obstáculos en la superficie lunar que debes evitar o destruir, como torres y satélites lunares, así como destructores alienígenas de la superficie. Si sobrevives y rescatas a seis mineros, podrás despegar de la superficie utilizando los anillos de aceleración.

meta.name: Ms. Pac-Man
meta.desc:
In 1982, a sequel to Pac-Man was introduced in the form of his girlfriend, Ms. Pac-Man. This sequel continued on the original gameplay, but added new features to keep the title fresh.
Ms. Pac-Man attempts to clear four various and challenging mazes filled with dots and ever-moving bouncing fruit while avoiding Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Sue. One touch from any of these ghosts means a loss of life for Ms. Pac-Man.

meta.name: Munchman (Beta)
meta.desc: Your Munch Man maneuvers through the maze, connecting the passages with a chain, when suddenly four Hoonos begin to close in around him. Can the Munch Man make it to an energizer in time or will the Hoonos devour him in his tracks?

meta.name: Munchman
meta.desc: Your Munch Man maneuvers through the maze, connecting the passages with a chain, when suddenly four Hoonos begin to close in around him. Can the Munch Man make it to an energizer in time or will the Hoonos devour him in his tracks?

meta.name: Munchmobile
meta.desc: Drive your Munchmobile down dangerous roads while trying to grab and munch the snacks scattered along the way. Be careful - one wrong move and you lose a Munchmobile!

meta.name: Othello
meta.desc: Your opponent has just outflanked you and captured your discs - you're surrounded. Can you outwit your adversary in this intriguing game of strategy, skills, and concentration?

meta.name: Pac-Man
meta.desc:
One of the most popular and influential games of the 1980's, Pac-Man stars a little, yellow dot-muncher who works his way around to clear a maze of the various dots and fruit which inhabit the board.
Pac-Man's goal is continually challenged by four ghosts: The shy blue ghost Bashful ("Inky"), the trailing red ghost Shadow ("Blinky"), the fast pink ghost Speedy ("Pinky"), and the forgetful orange ghost Pokey ("Clyde"). One touch from any of these ghosts means loss of a life for Pac-Man.
Pac-Man can turn the tables on his pursuers by eating one of the four Power-Pills located around the maze. During this time, the ghosts turn blue, and Pac-Man can eat them for bonus points. This only lasts for a limited amount of time as the ghosts' eyes float back to their center box and regenerate to chase after Pac-Man again.
Survive a few rounds of gameplay, and be treated to humorous intermissions starring Pac-Man and the ghosts.

meta.name: Parsec
meta.desc: Your spaceship must defend the planet from waves of attacks from enemy ships. A female voice, reproduced in speech synthesis, announces the attacks, your fuel level, your progress in the levels of the game and even your marksmanship! Parsec is a very addictive action game that you never get tired of!

meta.name: Picnic Paranoia
meta.desc: Armies of ants aided by stinging wasps and poisonous spiders are out to ruin George's outing. Swat the little buggers or they'll push point-laden food right off the screen. But be careful, insect bites are paralyzing. And only when you help George escalate the conflict with bug spray, can he really turn the tables on these pests.

meta.name: Pole Position
meta.desc: Pole Position is a Formula 1 racing game. Enter the Grand Prix, race against other racing cars to achieve the highest score possible in the shortest amount of time.nnnnBefore the player can enter the Grand Prix, the player must first qualify by competing in the Qualifying Lap within 73 seconds or less. If the player, however, does not qualify in the Qualifying Lap, the player may continue to race until the Race Timer runs after 90 seconds. The player will score 50 points per 5 meters and additionally 50 points for every racing car passed. When the time runs out - Game Over. The player will have to restart the Qualifying Lap.

meta.name: Popeye
meta.desc: Put yourself in Popeye's place. You've got a daffy girlfriend who goes by the name of Olive Oyl. Right now, she's got you running in circles, chasing hearts and notes all over the place. Then there's that blubber-brain Brutus, who's out to get you. And if that's not bad enough - you've got that nasty ol' buddy, the Sea Hag, pelting you with bottles. So go ahead and put yourself in Popeye's place - if you think you can handle all the action!

meta.name: Princess and Frog
meta.desc: Help! The prince has been turned into a frog and only the kiss of a princess can change him back. Guide our slimy hero through  jousting knights and menacing reptiles to reach the fair lips of the princess waiting at the castle. Can you help the prince out of this predicament, or shall he remain a frog for eternity?

meta.name: Qbert
meta.desc: Spring Q*Bert up and down the steps of a 3-Dimensional pyramid, but look out! All sorts of crafty arcade creatures pursue Q*Bert. You'll need good timing and quick reflexes to hop Q*Bert away from danger fast - or soar him to safety on a Flying Disc!

meta.name: Rabbit Trail
meta.desc: Hop along the rabbit trail and crawl through rabbit holes to collect all the carrots. However, you better watch out for weasels, hawks, and traps! Can you gather all your carrots or will you end up on someone's dinner plate? Peter Cottontail never had it this hard!

meta.name: Return to Pirates Isle
meta.desc: WANTED: A desperate or insane man to gather the 13 remaining treasures off of Pirate's Isle and return back safely. Has to be able to climb tall cliffs, swim underwater, squeeze through small cracks, and get along with pirate's. This adventure is for the daring only, all others need not apply!

meta.name: Rotor Raiders
meta.desc: In Rotor Raiders, you explore the vast uncharted regions of enhanced reality beneath out very homes. Through pipes and drains you wind your way to remove those nasty sewer rats, and clear their foot prints from the plumbing. You enter from above; but just when all is going well, the rats show up. First there is one, then two, and more. Every few seconds another rat comes into the pipes while your remote controlled router tries to clean it out...

meta.name: Schnoz Ola
meta.desc: Schnoz is trapped inside the Ola-Pyramids, home of the evil Ola-Balls. To escape, he must harvest all the tokens lying on the ground of each pyramid while avoiding the deadly Ola-Balls and bottomless pits. But look out! If Schnoz isn't careful, the evil Ola-Balls will turn him into Schnoz-Ooozela!

meta.name: Sewermania (MBX)
meta.desc: Help Sewer Sam battle ferocious rats and a toothy alligator on his search for a bomb hidden deep in the city's sewer system. If you are swift of foot and quick of wit, you might just have what it takes to help Sam save the city from slimy underground chaos!

meta.name: Sewermania
meta.desc: Help Sewer Sam battle ferocious rats and a toothy alligator on his search for a bomb hidden deep in the city's sewer system. If you are swift of foot and quick of wit, you might just have what it takes to help Sam save the city from slimy underground chaos!

meta.name: Shamus
meta.desc: Infiltrate the lair of the elusive Shadow, shoot and sneak your way through his army of robotic minions, and hunt him down before he does the same to you. Starring in the titular role of Shamus, you will have to find your way through over 120 rooms in this cross between Berzerk's "robots in a maze" action and Adventure's exploration of a predefined game world.

meta.name: Slymoids
meta.desc: You are the last defense against the hordes of alien Slymoids. Equipped with your handy Slymoid Scanner and Laser Fireball Gun, locate and destroy these strange life forms. But beware! The crafty Slymoids have turned spiders, bats, and even rocks against you!

meta.name: Sneggit
meta.desc: Evil reptilian forces have penetrated the barnyard, wreaking havoc. Gather your eggs to safety before they can be devouered by the hungry poisonous snakes. Be extra careful though...the snakes missed breakfast and are hungry enough to even swallow a whole chicken!

meta.name: Soccer
meta.desc: You zig zag your way towards the opposing teams goal all the while keeping a keen eye on the soccer ball. Then you deliver a powerful kick and the ball rockets forward towards a quivering goal keeper. The goal keeper lunges towards the ball, but then...Swish! It hits the back of the netting! The crowd cheers...you've just scored the game winning goal!

meta.name: Space Bandits (MBX)
meta.desc: Androids, space plunderers from a distant planet, have stolen Earth's valuable energy crystals and  have hidden them in a 3-dimensional tunnel. It's up to you to recover these crystals and return them to Earth so order can finally be restored.

meta.name: Space Bandits
meta.desc: Androids, space plunderers from a distant planet, have stolen Earth's valuable energy crystals and  have hidden them in a 3-dimensional tunnel. It's up to you to recover these crystals and return them to Earth so order can finally be restored.

meta.name: St. Nick
meta.desc: Wicked witches have swooped down on poor old St. Nick as he prepares for Christmas. They've cast evil spells on the elves, who are scattering toys everywhere. Help St. Nick collect the toys in time or he'll be late for Christmas!

meta.name: Star Trek
meta.desc: The power of the Starship Enterprise is at your command. Cross the galaxies with Warp Drive and Impulse Power. Defend the Federation with Photon Torpedoes and Phasers. Ward off the treacherous attack of the Klingons, the villains of the cosmos!

meta.name: Starship Pegasus
meta.desc: Alert! Enemy spacecrafts are approaching from every direction! Help defend the Starship Pegasus from destruction so it can safely deliver top secret battle plans to its home planet Zinthea. Failure to do so will allow the galaxy to fall under the evil rule of Lord Zarlop. The future of outer space is in your hands!

meta.name: The Attack (Beta)
meta.desc:
The report that outer space is being overrun by aliens has been nnverified. You, equipped with ten ships and your skill as a commander,nnare assigned to rid the cosmos of these menaces.
Activate all systems.
Texas Instruments brings you The Attack* Solid State SoftwareTM nnCommand Module, developed by the Milton Bradley Company. This nnone-player, four-skill-level game challenges your ability to plan nnand carry out a successful attack against the onslaught of thennaliens. You maneuver your ship through space with the arrow keys nnor the Wired Remote Controllers. When you are ready to fire, pressnnENTER or the FIRE button on the handheld controllers. Every timennyou successfully attack a spore or an alien, you score points. The nnobject of the game is to score as many points as possible by riddingnnouter space of the aliens. The game ends when the aliens deplete yournnship supply.

meta.name: The Attack
meta.desc:
The report that outer space is being overrun by aliens has been nnverified. You, equipped with ten ships and your skill as a commander,nnare assigned to rid the cosmos of these menaces.
Activate all systems.
Texas Instruments brings you The Attack* Solid State SoftwareTM nnCommand Module, developed by the Milton Bradley Company. This nnone-player, four-skill-level game challenges your ability to plan nnand carry out a successful attack against the onslaught of thennaliens. You maneuver your ship through space with the arrow keys nnor the Wired Remote Controllers. When you are ready to fire, pressnnENTER or the FIRE button on the handheld controllers. Every timennyou successfully attack a spore or an alien, you score points. The nnobject of the game is to score as many points as possible by riddingnnouter space of the aliens. The game ends when the aliens deplete yournnship supply.

meta.name: TI Invaders
meta.desc:
TI Invaders es un clon de "Space Invaders", en el que el objetivo es disparar a todos los alienígenas antes de que lleguen al final de la pantalla.
Al comienzo del juego, el jugador se enfrenta a una flota enemiga de once criaturas de ancho y cinco de profundidad. Con el joystick o el teclado, el jugador mueve una base láser (llamada misil en el manual) hacia la izquierda y derecha, presionando el botón de disparo para lanzar láseres a una cuadrícula de invasores de 11 × 5. Disparar a diferentes invasores puntúa diferentes cantidades. A medida que disminuye el número de invasores, se mueven cada vez más rápido. Al disparar al último invasor, el jugador pasa a una ronda de bonificación antes del siguiente nivel. Al igual que en Space Invaders, un OVNI aparecerá una o dos veces por ronda y viajará de un extremo de la pantalla al otro. El jugador tiene la oportunidad de golpearlo para obtener puntos de bonificación, la cantidad depende de dónde se golpee el OVNI.

meta.name: Treasure Island (Beta)
meta.desc: Treasure Island es un juego de desplazamiento vertical con gráficos isométricos. El objetivo es escalar una isla que se hunde mientras recolectas tesoros.

meta.name: Treasure Island
meta.desc: Treasure Island es un juego de desplazamiento vertical con gráficos isométricos. El objetivo es escalar una isla que se hunde mientras recolectas tesoros.

meta.name: Tunnels of Doom
meta.desc: You are about to take your first step into the unknowns of the Tunnels of Doom where all the myriad realms of fantasy coexist to challenge all would-be heroes. You must gather all your strength and wits if you wish to be victorious.

meta.name: Video Chess (DE)
meta.desc: Choose your own opponent - or play against the computer, on any 3 levels. With Video Chess, your computer can serve as a willing teacher - or a challenging opponent.

meta.name: Video Chess (FR)
meta.desc: Choose your own opponent - or play against the computer, on any 3 levels. With Video Chess, your computer can serve as a willing teacher - or a challenging opponent.

meta.name: Video Chess
meta.desc: Choose your own opponent - or play against the computer, on any 3 levels. With Video Chess, your computer can serve as a willing teacher - or a challenging opponent.

meta.name: Video Games 1
meta.desc: Exciting arcade fun for 1 or 2 players. Practice your aim with Pot-Shot, try your skill at Pinball, or trap your opponent with Doodle. Three games triple the action!

meta.name: Video Vegas
meta.desc: Test your luck at the most realistic slot machine outside of Las Vegas. Attempt to double or triple your money all on the pull of a handle! (Note: this game is not intended to be used as a gambling device)

meta.name: Wing War (Beta)
meta.desc: You're a great dragon in a world of primordial beasts, magic crystals, and powerful demons. Battle these menacing foes with fireballs, inner strength, and superior strategy to win the mightiest prize of all...the Super Crystal!

meta.name: Wing War
meta.desc: You're a great dragon in a world of primordial beasts, magic crystals, and powerful demons. Battle these menacing foes with fireballs, inner strength, and superior strategy to win the mightiest prize of all...the Super Crystal!

meta.name: Yahtzee
meta.desc: You roll a two, a three, a four, and two fives. Do you try for your fives or go for a large straight? All the action of the popular dice game in a Milton Bradley video game cartridge!

meta.name: Zero Zap
meta.desc: Ping! Bang! Boing! Do you have what it takes to become a pinball wizard? Find out in Zero Zap, where the excitement of the real thing comes into your home!
